summary: Over the past year, I've been deeply focused on building and refining Summit, a SaaS crypto algo-trading platform with AI and neural network components — this is my primary project. I've been shipping features across the full stack: LLM-powered sentiment analysis and decision-making, futures configuration templates, real-time cost tracking from OpenRouter, a unified news and announcement system, and extensive UI polish. In parallel, I've been developing firmware for ESP32-S3-based HID devices (j-uni-hid) and a Windows kernel-mode input filter driver (input-driver), both of which are also primary projects. On the secondary side, I've been conducting systematic research into crypto price prediction models (crypto-model-research), building a computer vision pipeline for poker table state extraction (poker-cv), developing an Android TTS app with multiple neural engines (j-tts-android), creating an on-device LLM agent for Android (ozwil-android), and maintaining a Windows Explorer file-tagging utility (intag2). I've also iterated on algorithmic trading strategies (freqtrade_startegies) and Telegram-based bot monitoring tools (freqtrade-tg-multibot). The work spans C#, C++, Python, Kotlin, and embedded systems, with a strong emphasis on practical, self-hosted tooling and research-driven experimentation.

items.title: Summit: AI trading platform core work
items.description: Built LLM-powered sentiment analysis and decision-making pipelines, futures-config templates with optimization defaults, real-time per-call cost tracking from OpenRouter, a unified news and announcement system, and extensive UI polish across the platform.

items.title: Jolt: minimal AHK alternative
items.description: Added opt-in debug logging, fixed winapi hotkey condition evaluation, and refined the scenario engine with typed actions and interception support.

items.title: Jamminroot: CV automation tooling
items.description: Added LLM model override via environment variable, enforced first-person voice in CV output, and refined the CV generation pipeline with dry-run support and better repo importance tagging.

items.title: j-uni-hid: ESP32-S3 HID firmware
items.description: Developed v13 firmware variant with fire-and-forget USB HID event emission and an 8x8 matrix variant with PlatformIO support.

items.title: input-driver: Windows input filter driver
items.description: Added push-style event delivery API, relaxed SDDL to Interactive Users, and built an integration-test runner covering all documented capabilities.

items.title: j-tts-android: multi-engine TTS app
items.description: Added question/exclamation intonation sliders, removed deprecated TTS engines, shipped F5-TTS and GPT-SoVITS export recipes, and integrated sherpa-onnx for Russian Piper voices.

items.title: MEMU3: CV and input emulation RnD
items.description: Switched YOLO GPU inference from CUDA to DirectML, added closed-loop tracking flick with bezier motion and user-input compensation, and refactored the mode system.

items.title: biscuit: e-ink firmware expansion
items.description: Added Knowledge Base app, FB2 reader, screensaver folder, and Mesh Chat fixes to the biscuit firmware for xteink 4.

items.title: j-uni-hid: firmware variant work
items.description: Drafted new v13s8x8 firmware variant and fixed a device disconnection issue in the v13 firmware.

items.title: papyrix: e-ink firmware features
items.description: Optimized map renderer for Apple Silicon, added grayscale tileserver, built map and Knowledge Base apps with full UI, and fixed FB2 encoding support for windows-1251 and KOI8-R.

items.title: FlCLash: proxy client update
items.description: Bumped Clash.Meta submodule to re-expose ProxiesWithProviders and GetProxyNameList APIs, and added XHTTP transport support.

items.title: crypto-model-research: price prediction RnD
items.description: Conducted hundreds of experiments on crypto price prediction models, achieving new best scores with Mixture-of-Experts architectures, snapshot ensembles, and cross-pair features; documented the full research pipeline.

items.title: ozwil-android: on-device LLM agent
items.description: Rewrote sub-agent architecture with session-based delegation and tool execution, added KV cache reuse, conversation revert/fork, and a questionnaire-based setup wizard.

items.title: MEMU3: aim assist and overlay work
items.description: Restricted aim assist to focused window, persisted mode and autofire state, and rewrote the overlay using D3D11+D2D+DComp with a status window.

items.title: blackboard-launcher: E-Ink launcher
items.description: Overhauled backdrop rendering, added swipe page navigation, status bar control, and fixed Onyx SDK drawing reliability.

items.title: intag2: Windows file-tagging utility
items.description: Added .pdf to supported extensions, restructured CI pipelines for manual triggering and auto-drafting releases, fixed Store publishing workflows, and added CLI support for reading properties.

items.title: jaxon: code intelligence engine
items.description: Added LSP integration for language-server-powered analysis, index freshness detection with incremental sync, and expanded DI registration and dead code detection for multiple frameworks.

items.title: n8n-nodes-telepilot-2: Telegram n8n nodes
items.description: Fixed auth race conditions, upgraded CI test version, added retry logic for npm install, and added a new album trigger.

items.title: yolo-labeler: on-host YOLO labeler
items.description: Added multi-select mark mode for batch delete and label clearing, Ctrl+Delete entry deletion, and flexible yaml resolution.

items.title: dotfiles: chezmoi-managed config
items.description: Set up initial Neovim config with full IDE setup, added pre-commit hook for secret detection, and fixed treesitter and LSP config for Neovim 0.11+.

items.title: poker-cv: computer vision for poker
items.description: Achieved 99% hand detection and 97.8% board card accuracy by implementing generator-based recovery, pipeline API, and comprehensive state validation; added smoke tests and refactored constants.

items.title: j-uni-hid: firmware updates
items.description: Added graceful COM restart handling to the firmware.

items.title: tasker: Android task management
items.description: Improved UX with direct launch, completed status, and touch event visualization on sensor charts.

items.title: n8n-nodes-claudecode: Claude n8n nodes
items.description: Fixed abort controller cleanup and changed default permission mode to acceptEdits.

items.title: j-uni-hid: major firmware iteration
items.description: Developed v11 firmware with USB Touch, BLE Touch+Mouse, self-reporting, performance profiles, and throttled mode; fixed Android reconnect and touch jitter issues.

items.title: auto-claude: autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Added squash-merge support, completion detection, Git Rules system, and Task ID fields to the autonomous multi-session AI coding application.

items.title: MEMU3: HID and aim assist updates
items.description: Added USB HID mouse movement hack with rate limiting and integrated it with the aim assistant.

items.title: freqtrade_startegies: trading strategy development
items.description: Developed and iterated on numerous algorithmic trading strategies for Freqtrade, including Fenix, botman, and custom pattern-based strategies, with extensive backtesting and parameter optimization.

items.title: freqtrade-tg-multibot: Telegram bot for trading
items.description: Built a Telegram-based multi-bot monitoring and management tool for Freqtrade instances, with web dashboard, Docker support, and daily profit calculations.

items.title: pAssistant: Telegram automation tooling
items.description: Maintained a Telegram content aggregation and reposting bot, adding image deduplication, multi-target sending, and summarization features.

items.title: freqtrade_monitor: Flutter trading dashboard
items.description: Built a Flutter-based mobile dashboard for monitoring Freqtrade instances, with glassy cards, winrate charts, and import/export functionality.

items.title: n8n-nodes-telepilot-2: Telegram n8n integration
items.description: Forked and maintained n8n nodes for Telegram automation, adding Alpine Linux support and Docker deployment.

items.title: freqtrade_strats: strategy optimization
items.description: Optimized and backtested various trading strategies for Freqtrade, focusing on high win rate and low drawdown configurations.

items.title: pAssistant: Telegram bot maintenance
items.description: Continued maintenance of the Telegram content bot, with logging improvements and bug fixes.
